post_comments_author_union.name: post_comments_author_union
post_comments_author_union.value:
("post_comments"."author_type" = 'admin' AND "post_comments"."author_admin_id" IS NOT NULL AND "post_comments"."author_client_user_id" IS NULL)
       OR ("post_comments"."author_type" = 'client' AND "post_comments"."author_client_user_id" IS NOT NULL AND "post_comments"."author_admin_id" IS NULL)

notifications_recipient_union.name: notifications_recipient_union
notifications_recipient_union.value:
("notifications"."recipient_type" = 'admin' AND "notifications"."recipient_admin_id" IS NOT NULL AND "notifications"."recipient_client_user_id" IS NULL)
       OR ("notifications"."recipient_type" = 'client' AND "notifications"."recipient_client_user_id" IS NOT NULL AND "notifications"."recipient_admin_id" IS NULL)
